name: Goa
description: Sun, sand and sea with vibrant nightlife, Portuguese heritage and relaxed coastal charm.

name: Manali
description: Snow-capped mountains, adventure sports, pine forests and serene valleys.

name: Kerala
description: Backwaters, lush greenery, houseboats and Ayurvedic wellness retreats.

name: Rajasthan
description: Royal palaces, desert forts, colorful bazaars and rich cultural heritage.

name: Ladakh
description: High-altitude desert, dramatic mountain passes, monasteries and pristine lakes.

name: Jaipur
description: The Pink City with Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, royal architecture and vibrant streets.

name: Agra
description: Home of the Taj Mahal, historic monuments and Mughal-era grandeur.

name: Varanasi
description: Ancient ghats, spiritual rituals, riverfront culture and timeless heritage.

name: Delhi
description: A mix of historic monuments, bustling markets, food streets and modern city life.

name: Mumbai
description: Gateway of India, Marine Drive, film culture and iconic urban energy.

name: Shimla
description: Colonial charm, cool mountain air, scenic walks and ridge views.

name: Darjeeling
description: Tea gardens, toy train rides and panoramic views of Kanchenjunga.

name: Srinagar
description: Dal Lake shikaras, Mughal gardens, houseboats and alpine scenery.

name: Rishikesh
description: Yoga, river rafting, suspension bridges and spiritual retreats on the Ganges.

name: Kaziranga
description: Wildlife sanctuary famous for the one-horned rhino and rich biodiversity.

name: Hampi
description: UNESCO World Heritage ruins, stone temples and ancient Vijayanagara history.

name: Coorg
description: Coffee plantations, misty hills, waterfalls and lush plantation stays.

name: Mysuru
description: Royal palace, silk, Dasara celebrations and a calm heritage city vibe.

name: Ooty
description: Queen of hill stations with tea gardens, toy train rides and Nilgiri scenery.

name: Kodaikanal
description: Cool mountain climate, lake views, pine forests and scenic viewpoints.

name: Chennai
description: Marina Beach, temples, museums and a strong blend of culture and urban life.

name: Mahabalipuram
description: Seaside stone temples, rock-cut monuments and UNESCO heritage artistry.

name: Madurai
description: Temple city with Meenakshi Amman Temple, heritage streets and food culture.

name: Rameswaram
description: Sacred island town with Ramanathaswamy Temple, beaches and coastal bridges.

name: Kanyakumari
description: The southern tip of India where three seas meet, with sunrise and sunset views.

name: Yercaud
description: Affordable hill retreat with coffee estates, orange groves and lake views.

name: Thanjavur
description: Brihadeeswarar Temple, classical art, royal history and Chola heritage.

name: Tiruchirappalli
description: Rock Fort views, historic temples and a central Tamil Nadu cultural hub.
